description.text: Beware of aspiring plumbers using the pipes to sneak around. One Cube and a Base.

ru.original: Beware of aspiring plumbers using the pipes to sneak around. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Берегитесь сантехников, по трубам крадущихся. Один куб и база.

es.original: Beware of aspiring plumbers using the pipes to sneak around. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Ten cuidado si te cruzas con algún plomero famoso.
Un generador y un núcleo.

de.original: Beware of aspiring plumbers using the pipes to sneak around. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Vorsicht vor übereifrigen Klempnern, die sich durch Rohre schleichen! Ein Generator und eine Basis.

pt.original: Beware of aspiring plumbers using the pipes to sneak around. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Cuidado com os aspirantes a encanador usando canos para pegar você de surpresa. Um Cubo e uma Base.

fr.original: Beware of aspiring plumbers using the pipes to sneak around. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Gare aux plombiers du dimanche qui se faufilent dans les tuyaux ! Un cube et une base.
